VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.label: adept
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.description: Adept biotics focus on control: lifting, suspending and hurling enemies with mass effect fields to keep them helpless.
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.tooltip: Adepts are dedicated biotic controllers. Exposure to element zero lets them warp gravity itself - throwing, pulling and suspending their foes, and trapping whole squads in singularities. Requires the Eezo Nodules gene.

VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.label: vanguard
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.description: Vanguard biotics charge into the fight, wrapped in a biotic barrier, ending it with close-range detonations.
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.tooltip: Vanguards weaponise biotics up close. They shield themselves with barriers, close distance in an instant, and discharge that stored energy in devastating slams and novas. Requires the Eezo Nodules gene.

VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.label: sentinel
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.description: Sentinel biotics wear enemies down with warp fields and keep allies alive with defensive wards.
VanillaPsycastsExpanded.PsycasterPathDef.tooltip: Sentinels blend attrition and protection - shredding armour with warp, draining life with reave, and projecting protective biotic wards over their allies. Requires the Eezo Nodules gene.
